data.title: XRP aims $1.40 by May w/ indicators showing oversold bounce. Short-term: $1.35; Medium-term: $1.40-$1.50 range; Support at $1.28.
data.description: Forecast for the price of XRP is as follows: In the short term, the target within 1 week is $1.35. Looking ahead, the medium-term forecast over 1 month is in the range of $1.40 to $1.50. A bullish breakout is anticipated once the price reaches $1.50. It is crucial for the support level to be maintained at $1.28.

data.title: BNB outlook: Expected $620 recovery by May 2026 despite current bearish trend. Trades at $590, oversold RSI hints at bounce.
data.description: Trading at $590, BNB shows bearish technical signals, though its oversold RSI indicates a potential rebound. Analysts suggest a target of $620 if bulls manage to regain crucial resistance levels.

data.title: By May 2026, Ethereum aims for $2,200-$2,400 range from $2,036 with potential breakout upon surpassing $2,105 resistance.
data.description: The current price of ETH stands at $2,036, displaying a neutral momentum. Technical analysis indicates a possible breakout towards the range of $2,200 to $2,400 if the key resistance level of $2,105 is surpassed in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: Bitcoin is at $66,768; RSI at 43.37. Forecast: possible rise to $70,000 if resistance at $67,932 is breached.
data.description: The current price of Bitcoin stands at $66,768, accompanied by a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 43.37, indicating neutral market conditions. Analysis indicates a possible uptrend towards the $70,000 mark if the crucial resistance level of $67,932 is breached.

data.title: $280M exploit in Drift Protocol took extensive planning. The same group behind the $58M Radiant Capital hack is believed responsible.
data.description: Drift Protocol has reported with a "medium-high degree of confidence" that the latest attack was conducted by the same individuals linked to the $58 million hack of Radiant Capital in October 2024.

data.title: From Climate Crisis to AI Innovation: Planet Classroom Launches Six New Films on Net-Zero Accountability, Global Hunger, and the Future of Technology
data.description: In April 2026, a series of events will focus on addressing key issues such as climate change, renewable energy, ethical artificial intelligence, and global equality. The events aim to showcase practical solutions that can make a tangible difference in the world. The lineup for these events includes discussions and initiatives centered on these pressing topics. The emphasis is on promoting climate adaptation and renewable energy sources, ensuring responsible use of AI technologies, and advocating for global fairness. These events aim to generate awareness and highlight actions that have a quantifiable impact on creating a more sustainable and equitable world.

data.title: Social media buzz on Bitcoin negativity hits 5-week high per Santiment, indicating possible turnaround soon.
data.description: According to Santiment, negative comments about Bitcoin on social media have reached the highest level in five weeks. This increase in bearish sentiment could potentially indicate an upcoming reversal in the market.

data.title: Bitcoin hits 5-week peak in bearish sentiment: Santiment reports surge in negative comments on social media, hinting at possible reversal.
data.description: According to data from Santiment, negative sentiments regarding Bitcoin on social media have reached their highest point in five weeks. This increase in bearish comments could indicate a potential turnaround for Bitcoin in the near future.

data.title: Taber, AB Named Winner of Kraft Hockeyville 2026
data.description: In an exciting announcement, Kraft Heinz, along with the NHL® and NHLPA, revealed that Taber, Alberta has been selected as the winner of Kraft Hockeyville 2026. Taber, Alberta will receive a generous $250,000 for rink improvements and will also have the honor of hosting an NHL® Pre-Season game for their community in the autumn of 2027. Additionally, the runner-up, Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia, will be granted $100,000 for rink enhancements. This initiative demonstrates a commitment to supporting local communities and fostering a love for hockey across Canada.

data.title: Haloid Solutions Introduces HALOID CLIP™ -- The World's First Magnetic Palm Microphone Mount with Glow-In-The-Dark Features and Adjustable Resistance
data.description: Located in Stony Brook, New York, on April 4, 2026, Haloid Solutions introduced the HALOID CLIP™, a groundbreaking accessory designed with innovation and problem-solving in mind. This patent-pending product has been carefully created to address customer needs and offer advanced solutions.

data.title: From NCAA Final Four, TravelingWiki Launches ShoheiAutographs.com for Leading Shohei Ohtani Autographs; Expands Generative AI Services for Sports Disabled Travel
data.description: TravelingWiki has unveiled ShoheiAutographs.com as part of its range of services, showcasing a GenAI platform in beta testing. The launch was made public in Indianapolis on April 4, 2026. This latest AI functionality is a significant addition to the TravelingWiki Foundation's offerings, revealed during the NCAA Final Four event.

data.title: Marie O'Malley to Speak on Manufacturing Tradeoffs Panel at MPP West 2026
data.description: PiSA USA has revealed that their Chief Commercial Officer, Marie O'Malley, is set to be a key panelist at MPP West 2026. O'Malley will be part of the discussion named "Cheaper, Faster, Compliant: Pick Two," focusing on the importance of balancing cost, speed, and regulatory compliance in the contemporary medical industry. This event highlights the significance of making strategic decisions in achieving optimal results in the medical sector.

data.title: Approval Genie Wins 2026 Consumer Choice Award for Business Excellence in Auto Finance, Peel Region
data.description: Approval Genie, a prominent auto financing company in Mississauga and throughout Ontario, is thrilled to receive the 2026 Consumer Choice Award for Business Excellence in the Auto Finance sector for the Peel Region. This accolade solidifies Approval Genie's position as a top choice for customers seeking auto financing solutions. The award showcases the company's commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction, reinforcing its reputation as a trusted provider in the industry. This recognition highlights Approval Genie's dedication to offering outstanding services in auto financing.

data.title: Pavel Durov says Iran's ban on Telegram has prompted thousands of developers creating VPNs to evade state internet control.
data.description: According to reports, a significant number of software developers, reaching into the thousands, are actively working on creating virtual private networks (VPNs) to bypass government restrictions on internet access. This statement was made by Durov.

data.title: Pharming Group announces the filing of its 2025 Annual Report and Form 20-F
data.description: Pharming Group has officially submitted its 2025 Annual Report and Annual Report on Form 20-F. These documents can be accessed at annualreport.pharming.com for detailed information regarding the company's performance and financial status.

data.title: Jerome Powell Sounds Alarm On $39 Trillion 'Unsustainable' Debt Path, Says It Will 'Not End Well'
data.description: During a speech at Harvard University, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell raised concerns regarding the fiscal path of the United States. Powell highlighted the country's $39 trillion debt load as being unsustainable, emphasizing the need for prompt legislative action to avert a potential crisis. He warned that if no action is taken soon, the situation may lead to adverse consequences. Powell pointed out that despite the high debt levels, the U.S. is in a better position than smaller economies, given its status as the world's reserve currency issuer and having deep capital markets. When asked about the breaking point for U.S. debt, Powell admitted that the exact threshold remains uncertain. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
